IN-GYM LAUNCH
RESOURCES
Zapier –
ClickFunnels
Leads to Google
Sheets
Creating a new Zap in Zapier that triggers when a new lead
opts in on a cold traffic ClickFunnel and puts the lead
information on a Google Sheet.
Creating a sample contact in you ClickFunnels, get your copy of
the Google sheet for Leads, and creating the Zap step-by-step.
